tiki_taka.label: Tiki-Taka
tiki_taka.description: A style of play characterized by short passing and movement, working the ball through various channels, and maintaining possession.

catenaccio.label: Catenaccio
catenaccio.description: A highly organized and effective backline defense focused on closing down spatial lanes and preventing goal-scoring opportunities.

gegenpressing.label: Gegenpressing
gegenpressing.description: An aggressive high-pressure tactical system that seeks to win the ball back immediately after possession is lost.

structured_counter.label: Structured Counter
structured_counter.description: A highly structured formation that maintains rigid defensive spacing and utilizes direct vertical passing to transition quickly into attack.
